Drugmakers agree to participate in second round of price negotiations The price negotiation process was established under former President Joe Bidens signature Inflation Reduction Act in 2022. Why Novo Nordisk Stock Outpaced the Market on Tuesday Novo Nordisk (NYSE: NVO), the Danish company best known as the maker of weight loss drug Wegovy, expanded a little on the stock exchange Tuesday.  UBSs Jo Walton reiterated the Swiss banks buy recommendation on Novo Nordisk stock at a price target of 750 Danish kroner ($110) per share.  Although its been something of an up-and-down stock so far this year, Novo Nordisk remains the pacesetter in the market for GLP-1 drugs, of which Wegovy -- indicated specifically for weight loss -- is the product most identified with the category.
